snippet.description:
Like the video? Every thumbs up helps! Also be sure to subscribe to get updates whenever I upload! It's free for you, and it helps me as a content creator grow! :)

#warrenbuffet #charliemunger #investing #marketanalysis #riskanalysis 
Buffett has made his fortune by relying on the time-tested rules of value investing, meaning finding high-quality companies at fair market valuations. He then holds these investments for the long term, some indefinitely, always allowing the power of compounding work its magic. Warren Buffett is an American business magnate, investor, and philanthropist. He is currently the chairman and CEO of Berkshire Hathaway. He is one of the best-known fundamental investors in the world as a result of his immense investment success possessing a net worth of $104 billion, making him the fifth-richest person in the world as of posting. Charlie Munger is an American businessman, investor, and philanthropist. He is vice chairman of Berkshire Hathaway, the conglomerate controlled by Warren Buffett; Buffett has described Munger as his closest partner and right-hand man.

snippet.title: Warren Buffett’s Most Iconic Interview Ever (Long Lost Footage)
snippet.description:
Click this link to get up to 15 free stocks from moomoo U.S when you make a qualified deposit! Terms & Conditions Apply: https://j.moomoo.com/00mF1u

Warren Buffett’s most iconic interview. This interview is from the 1980s and has legendary value investor Warren Buffett describing his investment style and how Buffett analyses a stock. Warren Buffett is the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, a conglomerate with a stock portfolio of over $300 billion. Buffett’s stick portfolio consists of company’s such as Apple, American Express, Bank of America, and Coca-Cola.

Warren Buffett's investment strategy is grounded in the principles of value investing. He seeks companies with strong fundamentals, including a durable competitive advantage or economic moat. Buffett looks for businesses with predictable and proven earnings, competent management, and a reasonable price relative to their intrinsic value. He emphasizes a long-term perspective, holding onto quality stocks for extended periods. Additionally, he often emphasizes the importance of staying within one's circle of competence and maintaining a margin of safety when making investment decisions. Overall, his disciplined and patient approach has contributed to his remarkable success in the world of investing.

snippet.title: "The Power of the S&P500" | Warren Buffett
snippet.description:
In this video, we're taking a look at one of the world's greatest investors, Warren Buffett, and how his approach to investing has helped him achieve incredible results over the years.

Learn about Warren Buffett's strategy for investing in the S&P500, and see just how successful this approach has been for him over the years. By the end of this video, you'll have a better understanding of what it takes to be a successful investor and how the S&P500 can help you reach your goals.

Warren Buffett is an American business magnate, investor, and philanthropist. He is the chairman and CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, a conglomerate holding company that owns dozens of subsidiaries, including major companies such as Geico, Duracell, and Dairy Queen. Buffett is widely considered to be one of the most successful investors in history, known for his long-term value investing approach and his ability to find undervalued companies. He is also known for his commitment to philanthropy, having pledged to give away 99% of his wealth to charitable causes.

snippet.title: Warren Buffett's Life Advice Will Change You - One of the Greatest Speeches Ever | Berkshire 2023
snippet.description:
In this insightful video, Warren Buffett and Charlie Munger share their wisdom on major mistakes to avoid in both investing and life. They emphasize the importance of writing your obituary and living up to it, making sure to stay in the game without making critical business mistakes. They also stress the significance of spending less than you earn, avoiding debt, and being cautious with credit card usage. Join Berkshire Hathaway and learn valuable lessons from these legendary investors. Discover the power of deferred gratification, avoiding toxic people and activities, and continuously learning throughout your life. Watch now to gain invaluable insights that can help you succeed without relying solely on luck.

☆Who is Warren Buffett (The Oracle of Omaha)?☆
Warren E. Buffett is one of the most successful investors in the world and the chairman & CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, who has a net worth of over 100 billion dollars. Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has posted average annual returns of 17.1% since 1985, well ahead of the broader stock market’s 10.5% including dividends. If you’d invested $10,000 in Berkshire Hathaway at the start of 1985 you’d now have $2.4 million; the same principal in the S&P 500 would now be worth about $227,000.

snippet.title: 💀 "La crypto va échouer" - Warren Buffett (Interview)
snippet.description:
#short #shorts 

Warren Buffett est l'un des investisseurs les plus prospères et les plus respectés du monde. Né le 30 août 1930 à Omaha, Nebraska, Buffett est le président-directeur général de Berkshire Hathaway, une société d'investissement qu'il a reprise dans les années 1960. Avant cela, il a dirigé son propre partenariat d'investissement, Buffett Partnership Ltd.

Buffett est connu pour son approche d'investissement dite "value investing". Cette approche consiste à acheter des actions de sociétés qu'il considère comme sous-évaluées par le marché, puis à les conserver pendant de longues périodes. Il s'intéresse principalement aux entreprises ayant des modèles commerciaux simples et compréhensibles, une gestion solide et honnête, et qui sont disponibles à un prix attractif.

En ce qui concerne les crypto-monnaies, il a exprimé à plusieurs reprises son scepticisme. Il a souvent fait référence aux crypto-monnaies comme "de l'air" et a déclaré qu'elles n'ont pas de valeur intrinsèque. Dans une interview en 2018, il a décrit le bitcoin comme étant "probablement de la poudre aux yeux" et a averti qu'il se terminerait probablement mal pour les investisseurs. En 2020, il a réitéré sa position en déclarant qu'il ne possédait pas de crypto-monnaie et qu'il ne le ferait jamais.

Il convient de noter que bien que Buffett soit un investisseur très réussi, ses vues ne sont pas nécessairement partagées par tous. De nombreux défenseurs des crypto-monnaies soutiennent que Buffett ne comprend pas entièrement la technologie derrière elles et que son approche traditionnelle de l'investissement n'est pas applicable à cette nouvelle classe d'actifs.

#bitcoin #crypto #blockchain #warrenbuffet

Warren Buffett est l'un des investisseurs les plus prospères et les plus respectés du monde. Né le 30 août 1930 à Omaha, Nebraska, Buffett est le président-directeur général de Berkshire Hathaway, une société d'investissement qu'il a reprise dans les années 1960. Avant cela, il a dirigé son propre partenariat d'investissement, Buffett Partnership Ltd.

Buffett est connu pour son approche d'investissement dite "value investing". Cette approche consiste à acheter des actions de sociétés qu'il considère comme sous-évaluées par le marché, puis à les conserver pendant de longues périodes. Il s'intéresse principalement aux entreprises ayant des modèles commerciaux simples et compréhensibles, une gestion solide et honnête, et qui sont disponibles à un prix attractif.

En ce qui concerne les crypto-monnaies, il a exprimé à plusieurs reprises son scepticisme. Il a souvent fait référence aux crypto-monnaies comme "de l'air" et a déclaré qu'elles n'ont pas de valeur intrinsèque. Dans une interview en 2018, il a décrit le bitcoin comme étant "probablement de la poudre aux yeux" et a averti qu'il se terminerait probablement mal pour les investisseurs. En 2020, il a réitéré sa position en déclarant qu'il ne possédait pas de crypto-monnaie et qu'il ne le ferait jamais.

Il convient de noter que bien que Buffett soit un investisseur très réussi, ses vues ne sont pas nécessairement partagées par tous. De nombreux défenseurs des crypto-monnaies soutiennent que Buffett ne comprend pas entièrement la technologie derrière elles et que son approche traditionnelle de l'investissement n'est pas applicable à cette nouvelle classe d'actifs.

snippet.title: Warren Buffett: How to Deal with Toxic Family Relationship | Berkshire 2023
snippet.description:
Join Warren Buffett and Charlie Munger in this thought-provoking video as they discuss the challenges of dealing with negative people, particularly when they are family members. Learn practical strategies to minimize the impact of negativity and create a happier and more successful life. Discover the importance of interacting with people who behave well, even if you have to make exceptions for family. Explore the inspiring story of the MacArthur family and their decision to distance themselves from a difficult parent. Gain valuable insights and guidance from these legendary figures and find ways to navigate challenging family dynamics with grace and resilience.

► Full Video: https://buffett.cnbc.com/2023-berkshire-hathaway-annual-meeting/

☆Who is Warren Buffett (The Oracle of Omaha)?☆
Warren E. Buffett is one of the most successful investors in the world and the chairman & CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, who has a net worth of over 100 billion dollars. Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has posted average annual returns of 17.1% since 1985, well ahead of the broader stock market’s 10.5% including dividends. If you’d invested $10,000 in Berkshire Hathaway at the start of 1985 you’d now have $2.4 million; the same principal in the S&P 500 would now be worth about $227,000.

snippet.title: Warren Buffett's most iconic interview ever in 2023.
snippet.description:
Charlie Rose conducts an interview with Warren Buffett. This is among the greatest chats the renowned investor and I have ever had. Mr. Buffett discusses the history of Berkshire Hathaway, his approach to investing, and the values he upholds in business while purchasing and disposing of companies. This interview took place in 2006.
 
American philanthropist, corporate magnate, and long-term investor Warren E. Buffett serves as chairman and CEO of Berkshire Hathaway. His net fortune exceeds 100 billion dollars, making him one of the world's most successful investors. Buffett was born in Nebraska's Omaha. In his early years, he showed an interest in business and investing, and during his career, he had genuinely amazing profits in the stock market.
